# ARCA GRID

> Sovereign Distributed Grid Mesh. Enterprise GPU orchestration layer for BTX, AI inference, training, and custom CUDA workloads.

ARCA GRID is the enterprise-grade orchestration layer for distributed GPU compute. The platform provisions tuned CUDA workers across a distributed mesh, with autonomous spot-market allocation, hard-capped thermal routing, and immutable, tag-pinned container releases. Operators deploy, monitor, and recover GPU fleets from a single control plane.

## Pages

- [Gateway](/): Enterprise GPU orchestration overview, features, and stats.
- [Architecture](/architecture): The six load-bearing layers of Autonomous Remote Cluster Architecture — pinned CUDA runtimes, immutable signed releases, autonomous spot-market allocation, custody-free payout plane.
- [Deploy](/deploy): Provision a tuned CUDA worker. Per-day or monthly compute tiers (Standard / Pro) with autonomous mesh allocation.

## Optional

- [Checkout](/checkout): Tier checkout and Stripe payment.
